displayName: siamSquare พจนานุกรมไทย คลังคำ
description:
A Thai word repository containing over 30,000 Thai words with Thai definitions.
Hot Keys:
CTRL+F1 : Open Layer Keys
F1 : word meaning
F2 : Misspelled words and similar words
F3 : Spell words
F4 : Open Siam Center Dictionary
changelog: fix on_replace_click: When selecting an item, close the dialog with EndModal immediately, then use wx.CallAfter to call execute_replacement after focus returns to the document.
